creator: raderphynalist@gmail.com
text:
The problem history is beyond my control because I installed this 13 for desktop use.

I have ntpdate_enable="YES" in rc.conf, so the OS time is correct. However, the KDE desktop time is not, and I'm not sure why KDE doesn't use the system time when the OS and desktop timezone are identical. 
https://basketrandom.pro/
